caption: A news segment from PLUSTVAFRICA features Bola Tinubu speaking in a setting with other people in the background. Tinubu is wearing a patterned grey and black garment and a red cap. He appears in a split-screen format; on the left, he is shown in a medium close-up, and on the right, a closer shot focuses on his face as he speaks, wearing glasses and a black and white patterned cap. To his side, a person holds a dark smartphone to record him. The screen includes several graphic elements: a purple "plus" logo in the upper left, a red and black banner at the bottom with the text "PLUS POLITICS" and a headline that reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a "FOLLOW US" section displays social media icons and the handle "PLUSTVAFRICA". Across the sequence, the visuals remain static with only subtle changes in Tinubu's facial expressions as he continues speaking.
